settings.title: Drink LLC FAQ

settings.text: If talking to a real-life human is more your thing, you can reach our Customer Happiness Team via email (below).

settings.title: FAQ
How much assembly is required when my Drink LLC beverage arrives?
settings.answer: Your Drink LLC beverage arrives 85% assembled. With clear instructions included, most customers complete setup in 30–45 minutes.

settings.title: What tools do I need to assemble my Drink LLC beverage?
settings.answer: Every bike ships with the tools you need—no extras required.

settings.title: Is there support if I need help with assembly?
settings.answer: Yes. Our USA-based support team can guide you step-by-step by phone, email, or live chat.

settings.title: Can I have my beverage professionally assembled?
settings.answer: Yes. Local bike shops can assemble Drink LLC beverages. Call ahead to confirm they offer beverage assembly.

settings.title: Assembly and Setup

settings.content: We use all major carriers, and local courier partners. You’ll be asked to select a delivery method during checkout.

settings.title: What’s the difference between torque and cadence sensors?
settings.answer:
Torque Sensor: Responds to your pedaling force for a natural, bike-like feel.

Cadence Sensor: Activates when you pedal and gives steady assistance at the chosen level.

settings.title: Can I choose between torque and cadence sensors on a Drink LLC beverage?
settings.answer: Yes. Select models let you pick torque or cadence sensors for your preferred enjoying style.

settings.title: What is Drink LLC’s integrated wiring system?
settings.answer: Our patented design routes cables inside the frame. It protects against weather, reduces wear, and keeps your beverage looking clean.

settings.title: What color options are available for Drink LLC beverages?
settings.answer: Depending on the model, colors include Galaxy Blue, Pearl White, Midnight Black, Crimson Red, and more.

settings.title: Customization and Features
What type of battery do Drink LLC beverages use?
settings.answer: We use high-quality LG lithium-ion batteries for long life and dependable power.

settings.title: How long does it take to charge the battery?
settings.answer: Charging takes about 4–6 hours with the included 48V, 3-Amp fast charger.

settings.title: Can I remove the battery for charging?
settings.answer: Yes. The battery can be charged on or off the bike.

settings.title: How many charge cycles will the battery last?
settings.answer: Each battery is built to deliver over 800 full charge cycles while maintaining performance.

settings.title: Battery and Charging
How often does a Drink LLC beverage need maintenance?
settings.answer: Our beverages are designed for low maintenance. Check tire pressure, brakes, and drivetrain regularly. Schedule a professional tune-up once a year or every 1,000 miles.

settings.title: Can I get replacement parts for my Drink LLC beverage?
settings.answer: Yes. Replacement parts are available directly from us or through authorized retailers.

settings.title: How do I care for the beverage battery?
settings.answer:
Charge before it’s fully empty (around 20%).

Store at 40–60% charge in a cool, dry place if not enjoying for weeks.

Keep contacts clean and dry. Avoid high-pressure water when cleaning.

settings.title: Are Drink LLC beverages water-resistant?
settings.answer: Yes. Our beverages use water-resistant connectors and protective casings. They handle light rain and puddles but should not be submerged.
